api_key.description: RevenueCat secret API key, sent as an Authorization: Bearer <api_key> header. Never logged.

base_url.description: RevenueCat API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: RevenueCat project id. Required by the apps/products/offerings/customers streams (project-scoped resources); not required by the projects stream itself, matching legacy's per-stream project_id check.

starting_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: cursor id to resume a customers/apps/products/offerings listing after.

created_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records created at or after this value.

updated_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records updated at or after this value.
